config.script:
import time
    
    self.props.enabled = False
    
    
    read_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/crane/allow_remote"
    write_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/SCADA/crane/allow_remote"
    
    read_value = system.tag.readBlocking([read_tag_path])[0].value
    sent_value = system.tag.readBlocking([write_tag_path])[0].value
    
    int_read_value = int(read_value)
    int_sent_value = int(sent_value)
    
    def send_delayed_command():

        time.sleep(0.5) 
        
        final_value = 1
        	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [final_value])
        self.props.enabled = True

    if int_sent_value == 1:
    	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        
        
    system.util.invokeAsynchronous(send_delayed_command)

    if int_sent_value == 2:

    system.util.invokeAsynchronous(send_delayed_command)

props.text: To use main functions the car must be disconnected

import time
    
    self.props.enabled = False
    
    read_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/crane/speed_mode"

    read_value = system.tag.readBlocking([read_tag_path])[0].value
    sent_value = system.tag.readBlocking([write_tag_path])[0].value
    
    int_read_value = int(read_value)
    int_sent_value = int(sent_value)
    
    def send_delayed_command():

        time.sleep(0.5) 
        
        final_value = 1
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [final_value])
        self.props.enabled = True

    if int_sent_value == 1:
    	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        
    system.util.invokeAsynchronous(send_delayed_command)

import time
    
    self.props.enabled = False
    
    read_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/crane/electromagnet"
    write_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/SCADA/crane/electromagnet"
    
    read_value = system.tag.readBlocking([read_tag_path])[0].value
    sent_value = system.tag.readBlocking([write_tag_path])[0].value
    
    int_read_value = int(read_value)
    int_sent_value = int(sent_value)
    
    def send_delayed_command():

        time.sleep(0.5) 
        
        final_value = int(not int_read_value)
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [final_value])
        self.props.enabled = True

    if int_sent_value == (not int_read_value):
    	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        
    system.util.invokeAsynchronous(send_delayed_command)

import time
    
    self.props.enabled = False
    
    
    read_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/crane/allow_remote"
    write_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/SCADA/crane/allow_remote"
    
    read_value = system.tag.readBlocking([read_tag_path])[0].value
    sent_value = system.tag.readBlocking([write_tag_path])[0].value
    
    int_read_value = int(read_value)
    int_sent_value = int(sent_value)
    
    def send_delayed_command():

        time.sleep(0.5) 
        
        if int_read_value != 2:
        	final_value = 2
        else:
        	final_value = 0
        	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [final_value])
        self.props.enabled = True

    if int_sent_value == 2 and int_read_value != 2:
    	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        
    elif int_sent_value == 0 and int_read_value != 0:
    	
    	system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        
    system.util.invokeAsynchronous(send_delayed_command)
